backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all game data types (races, tracks, players, subscriptions, teams, messages, store) and serving as the backend entry point for the racing game on ICP. Imports authorization, Stripe, and HTTP outcall modules alongside core libraries.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the race countdown/timer fix feature to its affected frontend files (AIRaceTrack, F1RaceTrack, SinglePlayerRace) and associated components, with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing short natural-language summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components, pages, and hooks.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors for background, foreground, sidebar, and chart elements.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for main menu, store, payment pages, and single-player race, wrapping everything in a ThemeProvider and handling authentication/profile setup state.
frontend/src/components/AIRace.tsx: Thin wrapper component that renders AIRaceTrack, forwarding an onExit callback as the onBack prop.
frontend/src/components/AIRaceSimple.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/AIRaceTrack.tsx: 3D AI race track component using React Three Fiber with player and AI car physics, a wall-clock-based countdown/race timer, lap tracking, and a HUD overlay for the pre/racing/finished race phases.
frontend/src/components/F1RaceTrack.tsx: Multiplayer F1 3D race track component using React Three Fiber with player and AI car physics, a wall-clock setInterval timer, countdown sequence, lap tracking, and HUD overlay supporting pre/countdown/racing/finished phases.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders a simple footer with a copyright notice, a heart icon, and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/FriendsManager.t: Provides a UI card for managing friends: adding by Principal ID and removing existing friends, using React Query hooks for backend interaction.
frontend/src/components/Groups.tsx: Displays a list of racing groups with options to join existing groups or create a new one via a dialog, using React Query hooks for data fetching and mutations.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders the app header with the Racing Arena logo, a theme toggle button, and a login/logout button using Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/components/Leaderboards.tsx: Shows global and friends leaderboard tables for a given season, highlighting the current user's rank and skill rating using tabbed navigation.
frontend/src/components/Matchmaking.tsx: Manages the matchmaking flow (idle, searching, found, racing) with simulated progress, displaying player skill info and transitioning to the F1RaceTrack component on match acceptance.
frontend/src/components/PlayerProfile.ts: Displays the authenticated user's profile card with skill rating, race stats (wins, losses, win rate), level, and embeds the FriendsManager component.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts new users to enter a racer name and creates their profile via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation with default stats.
frontend/src/components/race/RaceHUDOver: Heads-up display overlay for the race showing current lap count, speed in km/h, and a controls hint badge positioned over the 3D canvas.
frontend/src/components/race/RaceXPHUD.t: Fixed-position HUD component that displays the player's current XP total and animates the most recent XP gain notifications sliding in from the right.
frontend/src/components/race/RealisticRo: Defines the race track geometry via CatmullRom waypoints and exports utilities (`buildTrackCurve`, `getClosestTrackPoint`) alongside a Three.js scene component that renders the asphalt surface, curbs, and optional weather-based visuals.
frontend/src/components/race/RealisticSp: 3D sports coupe car mesh built from box geometries with a livery texture, spoiler, wheels, and lights; updates position, rotation, and wheel spin each frame via `useFrame`.
frontend/src/components/race/stuntDetect: Provides stunt detection logic that tracks airborne state and triggers a stunt event when a car meets minimum airtime, height, and speed thresholds with a configurable cooldown.
frontend/src/components/race/useCarContr: Custom hook that listens to WASD and arrow key events and returns a `CarControls` object with boolean directional flags plus normalized throttle and steering values.
frontend/src/components/race/useChaseCam: Custom React Three Fiber hook that smoothly lerps the camera behind and above a target car position and rotation each frame, with speed-dependent dynamic distance and height.
frontend/src/components/race/XPCoinTypes: Defines XP coin data types and a lookup map for four coin denominations (1, 5, 10, 20) with associated images, colors, and rarity, plus helper accessors.
frontend/src/components/SinglePlayerRace: Single-player 3D racing component using React Three Fiber that manages race state (laps, timer, phases), player and AI car physics along a CatmullRom track curve, and renders the scene with a HUD overlay.
frontend/src/components/store/storeCatal: Defines the StoreItemData interface and exports a static catalog array of seven neon light items with varying XP costs, descriptions, images, and colors.
frontend/src/components/store/StoreItemC: A React card component that displays a store item with its image, name, description, and XP cost, along with a purchase button that reflects owned, unaffordable, or purchasing states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useEngineAudio.ts: A React hook that synthesizes procedural engine audio using the Web Audio API with an oscillator, low-pass filter, and noise buffer, exposing controls to start, stop, set volume, and update pitch based on speed.
frontend/src/hooks/useForwardBackwardCon: A React hook that tracks W/S keyboard key states and returns boolean flags for forward and backward movement controls.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, managing login, logout, identity persistence, and login status across the React component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: A collection of React Query hooks wrapping backend actor calls for user profiles, race stats, leaderboards, friends, and other game data, with mutations that invalidate relevant caches and show toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useRaceAudio.ts: A React hook that manages an HTML Audio element for race background music, exposing play, pause, stop, volume, and mute controls with optional auto-play and looping.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines light/dark CSS custom properties for theming (colors, sidebar, charts) plus neon utility classes for text, cards, buttons, and badges.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Chat.tsx: Empty file with no content; likely a placeholder for a future Chat page component.
frontend/src/pages/MainMenu.tsx: Main menu page with tabbed navigation covering single-player race, multiplayer matchmaking, groups, team, leaderboards, and player profile sections.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailure.tsx: Payment cancellation page that informs the user no charges were made and provides buttons to view plans again or return to home.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Payment success page that confirms subscription activation, lists unlocked premium features, and auto-redirects to home after a 5-second countdown.
frontend/src/pages/Plans.tsx: Subscription plans page displaying free, monthly, and yearly tiers with feature lists, current plan highlighting, and Stripe checkout session creation on upgrade.
frontend/src/pages/Store.tsx: In-game neon store page that displays the player's XP balance, explains how to earn XP, and renders purchasable store items from a catalog using the purchase mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/Team.tsx: React page component for managing an F1 team roster, allowing users to join, change roles (driver/pit crew/director), and leave the team using query hooks and dialog UI.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended border radius, box shadow, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for a 2D racing game fix request, tracking a known issue where the race timer runs too fast and ends races immediately, with one existing feature targeting the timer fix.
